name: Lightning Bolt

components.material: a bit of fur and a crystal rod

description: A stroke of lightning forming a 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line blasts from you. Each creature in the Line makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much on a success.
scaling: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 3.
